raw_consumer_statement:
On XXXX I reserved a hotel in XXXX XXXX XXXX for XXXX As my dates came closer to my trip I tried to contact the Hotel and it looked closed and I couldn't contact anyone. I disputed the charge and Then the merchant contacted me saying all I needed to do was ask for a refund and they would have given me one. They said if I withdraw the dispute they could easily refund me but they couldn't because of the dispute in progress ( which I now know is a way to steal from customers ) I called citibank and they ASSURED me that I can close my dispute and re-open it if I don't get my refund ( I was worried about this FAKE HOTEL!! ) So I withdrew my dispute and NEVER received a refunds. I called BACK CITIBANK and the said NO PROBLEM we will reopen the dispute. DON'T WORRY. 
Now days later after talking to a dispute manager with no refund- He apologized for the misinformation that his two workers gave me! I replied if this is a common practice for shady merchants to rip off people .. shouldn't your employees know it? Anyway they said they can't refund me after closing the dispute- its the rule of Visa... I can't believe they can keep my money and blame it on Visa Rules after they told me to go ahead and withdraw the dispute. I know I sound like a crazy person but it's CITIBANK that told me to do it even though I had reservations about the company. Thanks XXXX XXXX XXXX
